Wikimedia.EventStreams.RecentChange.name: RecentChange
Wikimedia.EventStreams.RecentChange.description: Public recentchange events from Wikimedia EventStreams. Each event describes one edit, page creation, log action, categorization change, or related MediaWiki recentchanges entry from across Wikimedia projects.

schema.name: RecentChange
schema.description: Normalized representation of Wikimedia's mediawiki/recentchange event schema. This contract preserves the documented recentchange payload while renaming the upstream $schema field to schema_uri and serializing the variant log_params field into log_params_json for stable generated types.

event_id.description: Top-level copy of meta.id so downstream validators and consumers can resolve the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key from the event payload itself.

event_time.description: Top-level copy of meta.dt in ISO-8601 UTC format so downstream validators and consumers can resolve the CloudEvents time attribute from the payload itself.

schema_uri.description: URI of the upstream Wikimedia JSON schema from the $schema field on the original event payload.

meta.description: Wikimedia EventStreams envelope metadata describing the event identity, domain, stream, and Kafka-origin details.

uri.description: URI of the Wikimedia entity or page the event pertains to, when provided by the upstream stream.

request_id.description: Unique request identifier assigned by Wikimedia for the request that caused the event.

id.description: Globally unique Wikimedia event UUID for this recentchange record.

domain.description: Wikimedia domain the event pertains to, such as www.wikipedia.org or www.wikidata.org.

stream.description: Name of the upstream EventStreams stream that emitted the event, typically mediawiki.recentchange.

topic.description: Underlying Wikimedia Kafka topic that carried the event before it was exposed through EventStreams.

partition.description: Underlying Kafka partition number from Wikimedia's internal stream metadata.

offset.description: Underlying Kafka offset from Wikimedia's internal stream metadata, stringified to avoid range loss across generated languages and validators.

dt.description: UTC event timestamp in ISO-8601 format from the upstream metadata block.

id.description: MediaWiki recentchanges row identifier (rcid) for the event, stringified because some Wikimedia wikis already exceed signed 32-bit integer range.

type.description: Recentchange type such as edit, new, log, categorize, or external.

namespace.description: Numeric MediaWiki namespace identifier for the affected page, or -1 for special log events.

title.description: Affected page title in MediaWiki prefixed text form.

title_url.description: Canonical page URL for the affected title when present in the upstream payload.

comment.description: Edit or log comment as supplied by the upstream recentchange record.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp derived from the MediaWiki rc_timestamp value.

user.description: User name or IP address associated with the change.

bot.description: Whether the recentchange entry was flagged as a bot edit.

minor.description: Whether the recentchange entry was flagged as a minor change.

patrolled.description: Whether the recentchange entry had been patrolled when the event was emitted.

length.description: Page lengths before and after the change, measured in bytes or characters as provided by MediaWiki.

old.description: Length of the page before the change.

new.description: Length of the page after the change.

revision.description: Old and new MediaWiki revision identifiers associated with the change.

old.description: Previous revision identifier before the change, stringified because recent Wikimedia revision identifiers can exceed signed 32-bit integer range.

new.description: New revision identifier after the change, stringified because recent Wikimedia revision identifiers can exceed signed 32-bit integer range.

server_url.description: Canonical server URL for the wiki that emitted the event.

server_name.description: Server host name of the wiki that emitted the event.

server_script_path.description: MediaWiki script path on the emitting wiki.

wiki.description: Internal Wikimedia wiki identifier such as enwiki, commonswiki, or wikidatawiki.

parsedcomment.description: HTML-parsed form of the recentchange comment when Wikimedia provides it.

notify_url.description: URL that points to a diff view or other relevant page for the change.

log_type.description: MediaWiki log type for log events, such as move, delete, or patrol.

log_action.description: Specific MediaWiki log action name for log events.

log_action_comment.description: Additional comment field emitted for some MediaWiki log actions.

log_id.description: MediaWiki log identifier associated with the event when the change is a log entry, stringified for stable cross-language handling.

log_params_json.description: Serialized form of the upstream log_params field, which may be an object, array, or string in the raw Wikimedia payload.
